/usr/bin/c++  -O3 -march=native -ffast-math -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/nextham_preprocess.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nextham_preprocess.dir/stru_parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nextham_preprocess.dir/csr_parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nextham_preprocess.dir/block_parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nextham_preprocess.dir/neighbor_list.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nextham_preprocess.dir/transformer.cpp.o -o nextham_preprocess   -L/lib/intel64  -L/lib/intel64_win  -L/lib/win-x64  -Wl,-rpath,/lib/intel64:/lib/intel64_win:/lib/win-x64:/home/goodchong/NextHAM_debug_0525/pkg/libtorch/lib /home/goodchong/NextHAM_debug_0525/pkg/libtorch/lib/libtorch.so /home/goodchong/NextHAM_debug_0525/pkg/libtorch/lib/libc10.so /home/goodchong/NextHAM_debug_0525/pkg/libtorch/lib/libkineto.a -Wl,--no-as-needed,"/home/goodchong/NextHAM_debug_0525/pkg/libtorch/lib/libtorch_cpu.so" -Wl,--as-needed /home/goodchong/NextHAM_debug_0525/pkg/libtorch/lib/libc10.so -Wl,--no-as-needed,"/home/goodchong/NextHAM_debug_0525/pkg/libtorch/lib/libtorch.so" -Wl,--as-needed /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/11/libgomp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpthread.a
